name: [oss] fastify/fastify PR #6714: ignore duplicate trailer completions
notes: Adds a cbAlreadyCalled guard so a trailer callback runs once when mixing callback and promise, plus a test; idempotency fix, no security impact.

provenance.note: Reviewed-TN (single annotator): Adds a cbAlreadyCalled guard so a trailer callback runs once when mixing callback and promise, plus a test; idempotency fix, no security impact.
